use_cases: Capturing legally binding digital signatures on contracts and agreements
Collecting patient consent signatures for healthcare documentation
Authorizing financial transactions with hand-drawn signatures
Confirming delivery receipts with signature capture on e-commerce platforms
Adding signature fields to legal forms and real estate documents
ai_summary: A headless signature pad component from Ark UI that provides an interactive canvas area for capturing handwritten signatures. Features a drawing segment for signature input, a clear button for resetting the pad, and a dashed guide line for alignment. Includes built-in dark mode support with clean flat styling and is optimized for both desktop and mobile touch interactions.
